rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Fam. Code §51.0414 governs juvenile court transfer of dual status child cases. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subject matter with no overlapping operative effect.
quote: Sec. 51.0414. DISCRETIONARY TRANSFER TO COMBINE PROCEEDINGS.
_note: No relationship between the proposed property-tax exemption change and this juvenile-court transfer statute.
